cart.title: Ingqola
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Nceda wongeze idilesi yokuhlawula ukuqhubeka nokuthenga kwakho.
cart.addCardPrompt: Ukuze wongeze ikhadi loLwabelwano, nceda ucofe iqhosha lokwongeza ikhadi elitsha.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Nceda uhlawule ukuze inkonzo isebenze. Xa intlawulo ifunyenwe, inkonzo yakho iya kusebenza ngoko nangoko.
cart.bankPaymentNote: Emva kokwenziwa kweetlawulo, vula itikiti lenkxaso ne-ID yentlalo-ntle, umhla, nesixa esihlawulweyo. Siya kungenisa intlawulo ngesandla.

creditCard.name: Igama
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Ukuqinisekiswa kufuneka ngaphambi kokuba ikhadi lakho loLwabelwano libe nefuthe yokusebenzisa. InterServer iya kujuma ikhadi lakho loLwabelwano ngezixa ezimbini ezingaphantsi kwe-$1.00 ngasinye.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Ezi juma ziya kubonakala kwitatimende yakho yokuhlawula emva kwemizuzu embalwa, ngokuqhelekileyo phantsi kweentlawulo ezilindileyo. Ukuba awuboni ezi juma, nceda uqhagamshelane nomnikezeli wekhadi lakho loLwabelwano ngezinkcukacha ezingaphezulu.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Ezi juma zokugunyaza ngamazize okumane kuqinisekiswa kwaye ziya kukhangelwa emva kweentsuku ezintathu ukuya kwazihlanu, kuxhomekeka nebhanki yakho.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ndiyamkela iintlawulo ezimbini zeexeshana ezingaphantsi kwe-$1.00 ngasinye.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Ngena kwibhanki yakho yeintanethi yekhadi loLwabelwano okanye tsalela ibhanki yakho ufone ukuqinisekisa izixa ezimbini ezijumwe. Zibonakalisa phantsi kweeJuma eziLindileyo nebhanki yakho. Ezi juma zokugunyaza ziya kumka emva kweentsuku ezintathu ukuya kwazihlanu kuxhomekeka nebhanki yakho.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Nceda ufake izixa ezimbini ezijumwe kwikhadi lakho loLwabelwano. Iinani kufuneka zibe nge-USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Nceda uqaphele ukuba iintlawulo kwitatimende yekhadi lakho loLwabelwano zinokuba ngomali owahlukileyo kulowo ofunekayo kwikhasi lokugqibela lokuqinisekisa elichaziweyo ngentla. Ukuba itatimende yekhadi lakho loLwabelwano ayibonisi izixa zentlalo-ntle yokuqala ngomali efunekayo, uya kufuneka uqhagamshelane nenkampani yekhadi lakho loLwabelwano. Bafanele bakwazise izixa zeentlawulo ezimbini ngomali yokuqala.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukususa ikhadi lakho loLwabelwano {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Le khadi iqinisekisiwe kwaye ivuliwe ukuze isebenziswe kwiinkqubo zethu.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Cofa apha ukuvula le khadi loLwabelwano ukuze isebenziswe.

paymentSuccess.title: Impumelelo yentlawulo
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Enkosi ngentlawulo yakho. Intlalo-ntle yakho igqibezele ngempumelelo.

paymentTypes.title: Iindlela zentlawulo
paymentTypes.ccNote: Iikhadi zonke zoLwabelwano kufuneka ziqinisekiswe ngaphambi kokuba zisebenziswe. Ukuziqinisekisa, cofa iqhosha lokwuQinisekisa.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima iFatshi yakho {id}?

prepays.title: Imali eHlawulwe Ngaphambili
prepays.showingPage: Ibonisa iphepha {page} ye-{totalPages} kunye ne-{records} yamarekhodi kwi-{totalRecords}
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima i-prepay yakho #{id} nembali yayo enxulumene nayo?
